---
name: Security
about: Track a security issue, hardening effort, or security-sensitive change
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security"]
assignees: []
---

# Summary

Provide a concise summary of the security issue or improvement.

## Security Concern

Describe the issue clearly:
- vulnerability
- exposure
- missing control
- insecure default
- hardening gap
- dependency risk

## Affected Area

Which components, services, or workflows are affected?

## Severity / Risk

Describe the likely impact:
- confidentiality
- integrity
- availability
- privilege escalation
- data exposure
- compliance / audit impact

## Current Behavior

What is the current state?

## Desired Outcome

What secure state should exist after this work is complete?

## Scope

What is included in this security effort?

## Constraints / Dependencies

List important blockers, timelines, or external dependencies.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Risk understood and documented
- [ ] Mitigation or fix implemented
- [ ] Security validation performed where possible
- [ ] Logging / auditing impact considered
- [ ] Documentation or runbooks updated if needed

## Validation Plan

How will the change be verified?

## Disclosure Notes

Note any confidentiality, embargo, or limited-sharing requirements.

## Related Issues / PRs / Advisories

Link related material here.
